'''Evas VI''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="BF" /> of the [[Evas system/Legends|Evas system]], located inside the [[Belshar sector/Legends|Belshar sector]], within the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The world was [[Water/Legends|humid]] and it could rain for three [[Time/Legends|days]] in a row. The planet was also very cold and one would freeze to [[Death/Legends|death]], if not for the occasional [[Star/Legends|sunlight]]. By [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Linkaas]], a [[Pliith]] corporate criminal and [[President/Legends|president]] of the [[Linkaas Corporation]], resided on the planet. From the planet, Linkaas assigned two of his thugs to ambush and kill one of his employees, a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] named [[Dannen Lifehold]]—who owed him a substantial debt—on the world [[Dohu VII]]. However, the plan failed, Lifehold survived the ambush, and he arrived in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of Evas VI to contact Linkaas in order to tell him about his thugs' failure.<ref name="BF" />

==Behind the scenes==
Evas VI made its first appearance in the short story "[[Breaking Free: The Adventures of Dannen Lifehold]]," written by [[Dave Marron]] and published in [[February 1]], [[1994]] within [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 1]].<ref name="BF" /> The [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]] placed the Evas [[Star system/Legends|system]] in grid square I-7.<ref name="EAOC" />
